langs.en: Air quality is acceptable. Sensitive groups should watch for symptoms.
langs.hi: Vayu gunavatta theek hai. Sanvedansheel logon ko lakshanon par dhyan dena chahiye.
langs.regional: Havechi gunvatta theek aahe. Samvedansheel vyaktinni lakshanankade laksh dyave.

langs.en: Moderate pollution. Limit prolonged outdoor exertion if you have heart or lung conditions.
langs.hi: Madhyam pradushan. Hriday ya phephde ki bimari ho to lambe samay tak bahar shram na karein.
langs.regional: Madhyam pradushan. Hriday kinva phupphusachya samasya asalyas bahup shram taala.

langs.en: High pollution. Avoid outdoor activity, keep windows shut, use a mask outdoors.
langs.hi: Uchch pradushan. Bahar ki gatividhi se bachein, khidkiyan band rakhein, bahar mask pahnein.
langs.regional: Uchch pradushan. Bahercha vyayam taala, khidkya band theva, bahar mask vapara.
